p016.png.title: WUNDA CHAIR
p016.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair section intro with instructor photo

p017.png.title: 체어의 구조 (Chair Structure)
p017.png.raw_text_summary: Chair spring weight system and resistance level notes

p019.png.title: Pike Front

exercises.name: Pike Front
exercises.notes: Advanced level; spinal flexors, scapular abductors, shoulder flexors focus; maximize spinal flexion and keep shoulders over wrists.

p019.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair Pike Front advanced abdominal work exercise detail

p020.png.title: Pike Front

exercises.name: Pike Front
exercises.notes: Advanced level; standing on pedal facing Wunda Chair, trunk rounded, maximize spinal flexion.

p020.png.raw_text_summary: Pike Front advanced abdominal work on Wunda Chair

p022.png.title: Pelvic Curl

exercises.name: Pelvic Curl
exercises.notes: Set up in neutral spine, prehensile position; exhale roll pelvis and spine up, inhale pause, exhale return.

p022.png.raw_text_summary: Reformer Pelvic Curl spinal articulation intermediate level

p021.png.title: Torso Press Sit

exercises.name: Torso Press Sit
exercises.notes: Advanced level; spinal flexor and extensor control with hip flexor control; hinge around hip and shoulder joints.

p021.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair Torso Press Sit advanced abdominal work exercise

p024.png.title: Shrugs

exercises.name: Shrugs
exercises.notes: Sitting upright on box with back to Wunda Chair; raise and lower shoulders while pressing pedal; focus on scapular depressor control and trunk stabilization.

p024.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair Shrugs arm work fundamental level

p023.png.title: Jackknife

exercises.name: Jackknife
exercises.notes: Lying supine in front of Wunda Chair in Roll Over position; lift legs perpendicular, roll over, lift toward ceiling, roll down to start.

p023.png.raw_text_summary: Jackknife exercise on Wunda Chair, Advanced level

p025.png.title: Tricep Press Sit

exercises.name: Tricep Press Sit
exercises.notes: Starting in Shrugs position; inhale bend arms lifting pedal, exhale straighten arms lowering pedal

p025.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair Tricep Press Sit Arm Work Intermediate

p018.png.title: Pike Sitting

exercises.name: Pike Sitting
exercises.notes: Sitting on Mat facing Wunda Chair, trunk in C curve position; exhale lower arms pressing pedal down, inhale raise arms lifting pedal up

p018.png.raw_text_summary: Pike Sitting on Wunda Chair, Abdominal Work, Intermediate

p026.png.title: Triceps Prone

exercises.name: Triceps Prone
exercises.notes: Lying prone on Wunda Chair, arms straight, shoulders over wrists, hands on pedal, palms facing back, legs straight and together, feet plantarflexed, body parallel to Mat.

p026.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair Triceps Prone arm work intermediate level

p027.png.title: Frog Back

exercises.name: Frog Back
exercises.notes: Facing back to Wunda Chair, hips externally rotated, feet plantarflexed, heels together, small V position; exhale straighten arms lifting pedal, inhale bend arms lowering pedal.

p027.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair Frog Back arm work intermediate level

p028.png.title: Side Arm Kneeling

exercises.name: Side Arm Kneeling
exercises.notes: Kneeling side in front of Wunda Chair; elbow extensors and spinal lateral flexor focus; light to medium resistance.

p028.png.raw_text_summary: Side Arm Kneeling on Wunda Chair, Intermediate level

p029.png.title: Cat Stretch Kneeling

exercises.name: Cat Stretch Kneeling
exercises.notes: Kneeling upright on Wunda Chair, roll down flattening trunk and lowering pedal, roll up rounding trunk and lifting pedal.

p029.png.raw_text_summary: Cat Stretch Kneeling on Wunda Chair, Intermediate level

p030.png.title: Cat Stretch Kneeling

exercises.name: Cat Stretch Kneeling
exercises.notes: Kneeling upright on Wunda Chair, roll down flattening trunk and lower pedal, roll up rounding trunk and lift pedal; focuses on spinal flexors and extensors.

p030.png.raw_text_summary: Cat Stretch Kneeling on Wunda Chair, Intermediate level

p031.png.title: Tendon Stretch

exercises.name: Tendon Stretch
exercises.notes: Facing back to Wunda Chair, trunk rounded, arms straight, legs straight, feet plantarflexed; lift pelvis upward maximizing spinal flexion.

p031.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair Tendon Stretch advanced full body integration

p032.png.title: Lunge Forward

exercises.name: Lunge Forward
exercises.notes: Standing upright facing Wunda Chair, one foot on chair leg bent knee aligned over ankle, other foot on pedal plantarflexed leg straight; exhale straighten leg lifting pedal, inhale bend leg lowering pedal without touching bottom.

p032.png.raw_text_summary: Lunge Forward exercise detail on Wunda Chair advanced level

p035.png.title: Hip Opener

exercises.name: Hip Opener
exercises.notes: Lying supine, hips externally rotated, soles of feet together on pedal halfway down; exhale lower legs pressing pedal down, inhale raise legs lifting pedal.

p035.png.raw_text_summary: Hip Opener exercise on Wunda Chair, Intermediate level

p033.png.title: Step Down Back

exercises.name: Step Down Back
exercises.notes: Standing upright facing Wunda Chair, one foot on chair leg bent, other foot on pedal plantarflexed; exhale lift pedal, inhale lower pedal.

p033.png.raw_text_summary: Step Down Back on Wunda Chair, Leg Work, Intermediate

p036.png.title: Frog Front

exercises.name: Frog Front
exercises.notes: Standing on pedal facing Wunda Chair, legs bent, hips externally rotated, feet plantarflexed, heels together in V position; exhale straighten legs lowering pedal without touching bottom, inhale bend legs lifting pedal to start.

p036.png.raw_text_summary: Frog Front on Wunda Chair, Leg Work, Intermediate

p034.png.title: Hamstring Curl

exercises.name: Hamstring Curl
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine; exhale bend legs lowering pedal, inhale straighten legs lifting pedal; focus on knee flexion and pelvic lumbar stabilization.

p034.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair Hamstring Curl Fundamental Leg Work

p037.png.title: Side Stretch Kneeling

exercises.name: Side Stretch Kneeling
exercises.notes: Kneeling side in front of Wunda Chair, legs parallel, hip width apart; exhale arc trunk sideways lowering pedal, inhale return to start.

p037.png.raw_text_summary: Side Stretch Kneeling on Wunda Chair, Intermediate level

p040.png.title: Swan Single Arm

exercises.name: Swan Single Arm
exercises.notes: Lying prone on Wunda Chair, one hand on pedal, other arm out to side; intermediate level; very challenging.

p040.png.raw_text_summary: Swan Single Arm on Wunda Chair, Back Extension, Intermediate

p039.png.title: Swan on floor

exercises.name: Swan on floor
exercises.notes: Lying prone on Mat facing Wunda Chair, arms straight, shoulder width apart, hands placed on pedal, legs straight and together, feet plantarflexed; Intermediate level.

p039.png.raw_text_summary: Swan on floor Back Extension Intermediate Wunda Chair exercise

p038.png.title: Pike Side

exercises.name: Pike Side
exercises.notes: Standing side to Wunda Chair, trunk rounded, legs straight, feet placed on pedal, inside leg in front; spinal flexors and rotators focus; advanced level.

p038.png.raw_text_summary: Pike Side on Wunda Chair, lateral flexion rotation, advanced

p042.png.title: Shoulder Stretch Flexion

exercises.name: Shoulder Stretch Flexion
exercises.notes: Fundamental level; standing facing Ladder Barrel, flex hips and shoulders until trunk parallel to floor, hold and return.

p042.png.raw_text_summary: Shoulder Stretch Flexion on Ladder Barrel, Fundamental level

p041.png.title: LADDER BARREL
p041.png.raw_text_summary: Ladder Barrel intro page with BASI education note

p043.png.title: Shoulder Stretch Extension

exercises.name: Shoulder Stretch Extension
exercises.notes: Standing facing back to Ladder Barrel; placing hands closer together on ladder will intensify stretch.

p043.png.raw_text_summary: Ladder Barrel shoulder stretch extension, fundamental level

p044.png.title: Gluteals

exercises.name: Gluteals
exercises.notes: Standing closer to barrel will intensify stretch; hip extensors, abductors, external rotators focus

p044.png.raw_text_summary: Ladder Barrel Gluteals stretch, Fundamental level

p046.png.title: Adductors

exercises.name: Adductors
exercises.notes: Dorsi flexing foot will intensify stretch; lateral trunk flexion over leg on ladder barrel.

p046.png.raw_text_summary: Ladder Barrel Adductors stretch, fundamental level

p047.png.title: Hip Flexors

exercises.name: Hip Flexors
exercises.notes: Bend leg further for additional stretch; maintain pelvic stabilization and avoid lumbar hyperlordosis

p047.png.raw_text_summary: Hip Flexors stretch on Ladder Barrel, Fundamental level

p045.png.title: Hamstrings

exercises.name: Hamstrings
exercises.notes: Starting in Gluteal Stretch position; leg straight on barrel in line with hip; foot dorsiflexed; hinge from hips when leaning forward.

p045.png.raw_text_summary: Ladder Barrel Hamstrings stretch fundamental level exercise

p049.png.title: Side Over

exercises.name: Side Over
exercises.notes: Lying sideways on Ladder Barrel; arc trunk sideways lowering and lifting trunk; focuses on spinal lateral flexors.

p049.png.raw_text_summary: Side Over on Ladder Barrel, Intermediate level

p052.png.title: SPINE CORRECTOR
p052.png.raw_text_summary: Spine Corrector apparatus introduction page with instructor photo

p051.png.title: Swan

exercises.name: Swan
exercises.notes: Starting in Swan Prep position; spinal extensors, hip extensors, shoulder flexors focus; Advanced level.

p051.png.raw_text_summary: Swan back extension exercise on barrel, Advanced level

p050.png.title: Swan Prep

exercises.name: Swan Prep
exercises.notes: Lying prone on Ladder Barrel; lift trunk to diagonal line, straighten arms overhead, then return; focus on spinal extensor strength and trunk stabilization.

p050.png.raw_text_summary: Swan Prep on Ladder Barrel, Back Extension, Fundamental level

p055.png.title: Overhead Stretch

exercises.name: Overhead Stretch
exercises.notes: Intermediate level; spinal flexor control with shoulder mobility and thoracic stretch on barrel.

p055.png.raw_text_summary: Overhead Stretch abdominal work intermediate level exercise detail

p048.png.title: Side Over Prep

exercises.name: Side Over Prep
exercises.notes: Standing sideways to Ladder Barrel; arc trunk sideways over barrel then straighten and lift trunk back to start.

p048.png.raw_text_summary: Side Over Prep on Ladder Barrel, Fundamental level

p057.png.title: Openings

exercises.name: Openings
exercises.notes: Hip adductor control and stretch; pelvic lumbar stabilization; intermediate level

p057.png.raw_text_summary: Openings exercise from Supine Leg Series, Hip Work block

p056.png.title: Teaser Prep

exercises.name: Teaser Prep
exercises.notes: Lying supine on barrel step, lift arms/head/chest and legs simultaneously to perpendicular position; Intermediate level.

p056.png.raw_text_summary: Teaser Prep abdominal work exercise on barrel, intermediate

p054.png.title: Reach

exercises.name: Reach
exercises.notes: Sitting in C curve position, arms straight, shoulder width apart, shoulder height, hands holding pole, legs bent and together, shins perpendicular to floor; exhale roll down lifting arms overhead while straightening legs, inhale pause, exhale roll up returning to start.

p054.png.raw_text_summary: Reach exercise, Abdominal Work, Fundamental level, wunda chair

p053.png.title: Chest Lift

exercises.name: Chest Lift
exercises.notes: Fundamental level; lying supine, legs bent, shins perpendicular to floor, feet hip width apart, fingers interlaced behind head.

p053.png.raw_text_summary: Chest Lift abdominal work fundamental level exercise detail

p059.png.title: Scissors

exercises.name: Scissors
exercises.notes: Open legs to Scissors position with 2 pulses, switch legs; intermediate level.

p059.png.raw_text_summary: Scissors exercise from Supine Leg Series, Hip Work block

p058.png.title: Helicopter

exercises.name: Helicopter
exercises.notes: Starting in Openings position; circle legs around to Scissors position on opposite side, change direction after 5 repetitions.

p058.png.raw_text_summary: Helicopter exercise from Supine Leg Series, Hip Work

p060.png.title: Bicycle

exercises.name: Bicycle
exercises.notes: Starting in Scissors position, open legs to V position; avoid externally rotating hip when bending back knee.

p060.png.raw_text_summary: Bicycle exercise from Supine Leg Series, Intermediate level

p061.png.title: Bicycle Reverse

exercises.name: Bicycle Reverse
exercises.notes: Maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization; avoid externally rotating hip when bending back knee.

p061.png.raw_text_summary: Bicycle Reverse exercise, Hip Work, Intermediate level

p062.png.title: Roll Over

exercises.name: Roll Over
exercises.notes: Intermediate level; lying supine on barrel/spine corrector; spinal flexors, hip flexors, hip extensors focus

p062.png.raw_text_summary: Roll Over exercise on spine corrector, intermediate level

p063.png.title: Shoulder Stretch Lying Side

exercises.name: Shoulder Stretch Lying Side
exercises.notes: Fundamental level; lying sideways on barrel, coordinate arm circle with body roll and hip rotation.

p063.png.raw_text_summary: Shoulder Stretch Lying Side on barrel, Fundamental level

p064.png.title: Spine Twist Supine

exercises.name: Spine Twist Supine
exercises.notes: Lying supine with lower back and pelvis on barrel, legs in tabletop position, thighs perpendicular to floor, hands holding handles; alternate sides lowering and lifting legs.

p064.png.raw_text_summary: Spine Twist Supine on barrel, Fundamental level

p065.png.title: Side Lift

exercises.name: Side Lift
exercises.notes: Lying sideways on barrel; lift trunk on exhale, lower on inhale; focus on spinal lateral flexors.

p065.png.raw_text_summary: Side Lift on barrel, Lateral Flexion/Rotation, Fundamental level

p067.png.title: Corkscrew Advanced

exercises.name: Corkscrew Advanced
exercises.notes: Starting in Roll Over position, legs overhead; alternate sides; point lateral flexion (x)

p067.png.raw_text_summary: Corkscrew Advanced lateral flexion rotation advanced level

p066.png.title: Corkscrew

exercises.name: Corkscrew
exercises.notes: Intermediate level; starting on Scissors position; alternate direction; spinal flexor, rotator, and hip flexor control.

p066.png.raw_text_summary: Corkscrew exercise lateral flexion rotation intermediate level

p068.png.title: Swan Prep

exercises.name: Swan Prep
exercises.notes: Fundamental level; lying prone on barrel, lift trunk to diagonal line then straighten arms overhead and return.

p068.png.raw_text_summary: Swan Prep on barrel, Back Extension, Fundamental level

p072.png.title: Lever Orientation & Lever Length
p072.png.raw_text_summary: Lever orientation and length notes with reformer spring image

p070.png.title: F2 Spine Corrector
p070.png.raw_text_summary: F2 Spine Corrector intro page with BASI note

p069.png.title: Swan

exercises.name: Swan
exercises.notes: Starting in Swan Prep position, hips externally rotated; lift trunk, straighten arms overhead with legs and plantarflex feet, bend arms placing hands behind head, lower trunk and legs returning to start.

p069.png.raw_text_summary: Swan back extension advanced level exercise detail

p071.png.title: Reach

exercises.name: Reach
exercises.notes: Sitting in C curve position, arms straight, shoulder width apart; roll down, lift arms overhead, straighten legs, place head on barrel.

p071.png.raw_text_summary: Reach exercise, Abdominal Work, Fundamental level, barrel

p073.png.title: Hundred Prep

exercises.name: Hundred Prep
exercises.notes: Lying supine over barrel, arms straight, legs bent and together, shins perpendicular to floor; spinal flexors focus

p073.png.raw_text_summary: Hundred Prep abdominal work fundamental level barrel

p074.png.title: Teaser Prep

exercises.name: Teaser Prep
exercises.notes: Lying supine over barrel; lift arms, head, chest and legs simultaneously; spinal and hip flexor strength and stretch.

p074.png.raw_text_summary: Teaser Prep exercise on Wunda Chair, Fundamental level

p076.png.title: Openings

exercises.name: Openings
exercises.notes: Starting in Frog position, hips externally rotated, legs straight and together, perpendicular to floor, feet plantarflexed; open legs out to sides on inhale, close on exhale.

p076.png.raw_text_summary: Openings exercise from Supine Leg Series, Hip Work block

p075.png.title: Frog

exercises.name: Frog
exercises.notes: Lying supine, lower back and pelvis on barrel, shoulders on Mat, hands holding levers, legs bent, hips externally rotated, feet dorsiflexed in straps, heels together

p075.png.raw_text_summary: Frog exercise, Supine Leg Series, Hip Work, Intermediate

p079.png.title: Roll Over

exercises.name: Roll Over
exercises.notes: Spine corrector roll over; start with legs at 90 degrees (position 4); spinal flexors and hip flexors focus; intermediate level.

p079.png.raw_text_summary: Roll Over exercise on spine corrector, intermediate level

p077.png.title: Scissors

exercises.name: Scissors
exercises.notes: Starting in Frog position, hips externally rotated, legs straight and together, perpendicular to floor, feet plantarflexed; open legs to Scissors position (2 pulses) then switch legs (2 pulses).

p077.png.raw_text_summary: Scissors exercise, Supine Leg Series, Hip Work, Intermediate

p078.png.title: Helicopter

exercises.name: Helicopter
exercises.notes: Starting in Frog position, hips externally rotated, legs straight and together, perpendicular to floor, feet plantarflexed; change direction after 5 repetitions

p078.png.raw_text_summary: Helicopter supine leg series hip work intermediate level

p080.png.title: Side Over with Extended Arms

exercises.name: Side Over with Extended Arms
exercises.notes: Lying sideways on barrel, bottom leg bent, foot plantarflexed, top leg straight in strap, arms straight and overhead; Intermediate level.

p080.png.raw_text_summary: Side Over with Extended Arms on barrel, intermediate level

p083.png.raw_text_summary: BASI Pilates logo and contact information page

p081.png.title: Swan

exercises.name: Swan
exercises.notes: Lying prone over barrel, feet on floor, legs bent and together, hands on levers, elbows out to sides; Socket C, Lever Orientation 0, Lever Length 1, Lever Direction 7
